lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Jakob! A master of the surf, my friend. A true guru!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A sailor, then?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: A surfer at heart. That's where I got my start, but you can't take a cargo crate on a board, so being a sailor pays the bills!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at least sailing still lets you enjoy the sea when you're not surfing.

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Very true! Until next time, friend.

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Jakob! A master of the surf, my friend. A true guru!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A sailor, then?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: A surfer at heart. That's where I got my start, but you can't take a cargo crate on a board, so being a sailor pays the bills!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at some point I hope to hire a crew to sail with myself. Maybe you'd be interested in joining me once I'm ready for that sort of thing?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Sounds swell! You just let me know once you are.

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again. How's it going?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Very well, thank you. Still sailing, and surfing, of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at some point I hope to hire a crew to sail with myself. Maybe you'd be interested in joining me once I'm ready for that sort of thing?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Sounds swell! You just let me know once you are.

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Jakob! A master of the surf, my friend. A true guru!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A sailor, then?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: A surfer at heart. That's where I got my start, but you can't take a cargo crate on a board, so being a sailor pays the bills!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you're a sailor, would you be interested in joining my crew?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Sorry, but I don't think you've got what it takes to surf, friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you're a sailor, would you be interested in joining my crew?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Yeah, I think we can make a surfer out of you for sure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, good luck with it all.

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: And you! Until next time, friend.

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: Hey there, friend!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. How are you enjoying being part of the crew?

lines.speaker: Sailor Jakob
lines.text: I'm so relaxed! Would like a touch more surfing on my rota though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see what I can do.
